documentation.text:
@title SpendLimitWallet
 @notice A smart wallet that enforces a maximum spend per rolling time window.
 State Machine
 ─────────────
   IDLE   → No spending has occurred in the current window (or window has expired).
   ACTIVE → At least one spend has been approved, but the daily limit is not yet reached.
   LOCKED → The cumulative spend for this window has hit (or exceeded) the daily limit.
            No further spending is allowed until the window resets.
 Window Reset
 ────────────
   When `spend()` is called and the previous window has expired, the contract
   automatically resets `spentInWindow` to zero and starts a fresh window.
 Events
 ──────
   Deposited       – ETH deposited into the wallet.
   SpendApproved   – A spend was within the limit and executed successfully.
   SpendRejected   – A spend was blocked because it would exceed the limit.
   WindowReset     – The spending window expired and a new one has begun.
   LimitUpdated    – The owner changed the daily limit.

@param _dailyLimit     Maximum wei that may be spent in one window.
 @param _windowDuration Seconds in one rolling window (0 → default 24 h).
@notice Returns true when the current spending window has expired.
@notice Current state of the wallet's spend-limit state machine.

@notice Owner can adjust the daily limit at any time.
         The change takes effect immediately within the current window.
@notice Deposit ETH into the wallet. Anyone can fund it.
@notice Fallback – accept plain ETH transfers as deposits.

wei that may be spent in one window.","_windowDuration":"Seconds in one rolling window (0 \u2192 default 24 h)."}},"getWindowInfo()":{"returns":{"balance":"     Contract's ETH balance.","remaining":"   Wei still available before the limit is hit.","spent":"       Wei already spent in this window (0 if window expired).","state":"       Current state-machine value.","windowEndsAt":"Unix timestamp when the window closes (0 if IDLE)."}},"spend(address,uint256,string)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount in wei to transfer.","description":"Human-readable label (e.g. \"NFT purchase\").","to":"Recipient address (must be non-zero)."}}},"title":"SpendLimitWallet","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"currentState()":{"notice":"Current state of the wallet's spend-limit state machine."},"deposit()":{"notice":"Deposit ETH into the wallet. Anyone can fund it."},"getWindowInfo()":{"notice":"Aggregated window status \u2013 useful for a single frontend read."},"isWindowExpired()":{"notice":"Returns true when the current spending window has expired."},"spend(address,uint256,string)":{"notice":"Attempt to send `amount` wei to `to`. Rules \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 1. Only the owner may call this. 2. If the current window has expired, it is reset automatically. 3. The cumulative spend for this window must not exceed `dailyLimit`. 4. The contract must hold sufficient ETH."},"updateLimit(uint256)":{"notice":"Owner can adjust the daily limit at any time.         The change takes effect immediately within the current window."}},"notice":"A smart wallet that enforces a maximum spend per rolling time window. State Machine \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500   IDLE   \u2192 No spending has occurred in the current window (or window has expired).   ACTIVE \u2192 At least one spend has been approved, but the daily limit is not yet reached.   LOCKED \u2192 The cumulative spend for this window has hit (or exceeded) the daily limit.            No further spending is allowed until the window resets. Window Reset \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500   When `spend()` is called and the previous window has expired, the contract   automatically resets `spentInWindow` to zero and starts a fresh window. Events \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500   Deposited       \u2013 ETH deposited into the wallet.   SpendApproved   \u2013 A spend was within the limit and executed successfully.   SpendRejected   \u2013 A spend was blocked because it would exceed the limit.   WindowReset     \u2013 The spending window expired and a new one has begun.   LimitUpdated    \u2013 The owner changed the daily limit.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/SpendLimitWallet.sol":"SpendLimitWallet"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/SpendLimitWallet.sol":{"keccak256":"0x50b893e21dd1403a09693d6c72aa1ebeb93a8d343d77610b679a289e9982fd31","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://4e92c1713405ca789fea2bb6b05146a57d9e9e2460450b849a389f95d0356300","dweb:/ipfs/QmcQYQhK7N6LKg5Z8PtQGSmXTMLGyJCfctpAr1tcVWYmkc"]}},"version":1}
